findings.element: Overdue Controls table, FRAMEWORK column, row 2
findings.observation: Raw UUID bbb41940-3cd2-4dc3-8805-f680f0f85422 rendered as framework name instead of human-readable name
findings.suggestion: Fix SQL join in overdue controls query to resolve framework UUID to display name
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — UUIDs must never appear in primary display

findings.element: Overdue Controls table, CONTROL NAME column, row 2
findings.observation: CONTROL NAME shows SW-001 — identical to CONTROL ID. Name not resolved from framework definition.
findings.suggestion: Populate control name from definition or show em dash if unavailable
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — never show duplicated ID in name field

findings.element: Overdue Controls table — inactive framework rows
findings.observation: Table shows controls from ISO 27001, HIPAA, SOC 2 which are not among the 2 active frameworks
findings.suggestion: Scope overdue controls query to active frameworks or clearly label inactive data
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — scope of data must be consistent with page context

findings.observation: Chart title says 'Last 90 Days' but X-axis spans only Mar 25-Apr 3 (~10 days) — factually wrong
findings.suggestion: Dynamically set title to match actual data range or backfill 90 days of seed data
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — charts must be labeled honestly

findings.element: test-001 framework name across all surfaces
findings.observation: Seed data artifact 'test-001' visible on framework cards, chart legend, detail page H1, breadcrumb, overdue table, framework management panel
findings.suggestion: Rename seed framework to realistic name; also rename 'test' and 'Test QA Framework' entries
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — no placeholder content visible to end users

findings.observation: Focus screenshots show zero visible focus rings on any element. Keyboard navigation is completely blind. WCAG 2.4.7 failure.
findings.suggestion: Apply global :focus-visible outline styles with brand accent color, 2px solid, 2px offset
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — focus indicators; WCAG 2.4.7

findings.observation: favicon.ico returns 404. Blank browser tab icon.
findings.suggestion: Add favicon.ico to web/public/
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — favicon must be set and match product logo

findings.observation: Ring renders green/teal at 75% while status is NON-COMPLIANT. Green contradicts the failing status.
findings.suggestion: Apply semantic color: green >=95%, amber 80-94%, red <80%
findings.standard_violated: visual.md — semantic color mapping; consistency.md — color meaning consistency

findings.observation: 75% shown as NON-COMPLIANT but no threshold indicator visible. Users cannot interpret what score is needed.
findings.suggestion: Add 'Target: 95%' next to status badge or threshold marker on ring gauge
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — compliance data must cite methodology

findings.observation: Contains exactly one item: Export Report. Single-item dropdown is an antipattern.
findings.suggestion: Promote Export to standalone button; remove dropdown until 2+ actions exist
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — button hierarchy; interaction.md — action discoverability

findings.element: Overdue Controls table — no row actions
findings.observation: 4 overdue controls with zero remediation path. Table is a dead end.
findings.suggestion: Add View or Remediate action column linking to framework detail controls tab
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — action paths; interaction.md — complete workflows

findings.observation: Post-click screenshot identical to pre-click. No toast, loading state, or timestamp update.
findings.suggestion: Show loading state, success toast, update Last evaluated timestamp
findings.standard_violated: interaction.md — async operations must show loading indicator

findings.observation: Sidebar shows placeholder U / User instead of authenticated user name
findings.suggestion: Wire /api/v1/auth/me response to sidebar avatar component
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — no placeholder content

findings.observation: Summary shows 1 OVERDUE CONTROLS but table has 4 rows. 1=frameworks, 4=controls — ambiguous.
findings.suggestion: Change label to FRAMEWORKS WITH OVERDUE CONTROLS or show consistent count
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — counts must be unambiguous

findings.observation: Y-axis shows percentage ticks but no label. Also starts at 40% not 0% without indication.
findings.suggestion: Add Y-axis label 'Compliance Score (%)'; consider starting at 0% or add axis break
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — both axes must be labeled with units

findings.element: SLA Tracking tab — misleading empty state
findings.observation: Shows 'No controls with SLA deadlines' but Controls tab shows SLA data. Contradictory.
findings.suggestion: Fix SLA tracking query or improve empty state with CTA to configure SLA deadlines
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — empty states must have CTA; data consistency across tabs

findings.observation: Green circle indicators on endpoint rows with no text label. Color alone conveys status.
findings.suggestion: Add PASS/FAIL text labels and compliance score column per endpoint
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — never color alone; data-integrity.md — status must combine color with text

findings.observation: Panel shows test-001, test, Test QA Framework as custom framework names alongside real one
findings.suggestion: Remove/rename all test-prefixed seed data frameworks
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — no placeholder content

findings.element: Remediate button — inconsistent and no visible outcome
findings.observation: Remediate appears on framework 2 failing controls but not framework 1. No visible outcome on click.
findings.suggestion: Standardize action availability; wire to deployment wizard or confirmation dialog
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — same action same pattern; interaction.md — feedback required

findings.observation: Framework 2 detail shows current 50% but history cards show 100% entries — data mismatch
findings.suggestion: Fix evaluation history query to show actual recorded scores per framework
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — data must be internally consistent

findings.observation: No pagination controls, no total count indicator. Silently truncates at scale.
findings.suggestion: Add server-side pagination with visible controls and Showing X of Y footer
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — all lists must be paginated

findings.observation: Badge count concatenated into link name: 'Alerts 80'. Screen readers announce combined string.
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label='Alerts' on link; aria-hidden='true' on badge span
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — links must have descriptive labels

findings.observation: Two links both named 'View Details' — indistinguishable by screen reader link list
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label='View details for {framework name}' per link
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — WCAG 2.4.9

findings.observation: Two buttons both named 'Evaluate' — indistinguishable by screen reader
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label='Evaluate {framework name}' per button
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — WCAG 4.1.2

findings.observation: Section labels are plain StaticText with no list/group semantics
findings.suggestion: Wrap each section in <ul aria-label='{Section}'> with <li> elements
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — landmark regions; WCAG 1.3.1

findings.element: ALL-CAPS column headers in HTML DOM
findings.observation: Headers like FRAMEWORK, CONTROL ID rendered as uppercase in DOM. Screen readers may spell letter-by-letter.
findings.suggestion: Use Title Case in HTML; apply text-transform: uppercase via CSS
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — tables; consistency.md — naming conventions

findings.observation: Action buttons clipped/not visible. Sidebar consumes ~40% of viewport.
findings.suggestion: Collapse sidebar to icon-only at 768px; stack action buttons below title
findings.standard_violated: visual.md — responsive layout; enterprise.md — professional appearance

findings.observation: '4h ago' labels have no tooltip showing absolute date/time
findings.suggestion: Add title attribute with absolute ISO timestamp on all relative time labels
findings.standard_violated: data-integrity.md — always show absolute time in tooltip

findings.element: Built-in vs custom framework row anatomy
findings.observation: Framework Management drawer uses different row design for built-in vs custom frameworks
findings.suggestion: Unify row anatomy; only difference should be built-in lacking delete
findings.standard_violated: consistency.md — same type same anatomy

findings.element: Icon-only edit/delete buttons — no accessible names
findings.observation: Edit and delete icon buttons in framework management have no aria-labels or tooltips
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label='Edit {name}' / aria-label='Delete {name}' per button
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — icon-only buttons must have aria-label

findings.element: Compliance trend chart — inaccessible to screen readers
findings.observation: Chart uses role='application' with no text alternative or data table fallback
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label with summary; add visually-hidden data table alternative
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — charts need text alternatives

findings.element: AI Assistant coming soon button in topbar
findings.observation: Active-looking button for unimplemented feature visible during POC demo
findings.suggestion: Remove button until functional or style as clearly unavailable
findings.standard_violated: enterprise.md — no placeholder content

findings.element: Framework detail tab URLs not bookmarkable
findings.observation: Switching tabs does not update URL — cannot bookmark or share direct link to Controls/Endpoints tab
findings.suggestion: Append tab identifier to URL via search params or nested routes
findings.standard_violated: qa-engineer — URL should persist tab state

findings.observation: Tab content sections have no <h2> headings — screen reader heading navigation finds nothing below h1
findings.suggestion: Add <h2> for each content section within tab panels
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — heading hierarchy

findings.observation: '22d' split into two text nodes; no tooltip for full duration text
findings.suggestion: Add aria-label='22 days' or use <abbr title='days'>d</abbr>
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — abbreviation pronunciation

findings.observation: Region labeled 'Notifications alt+T' — keyboard shortcut should not be in landmark label
findings.suggestion: Change aria-label to simply 'Notifications'
findings.standard_violated: accessibility.md — landmark regions
